info.name: Domains API
v1
Retrieve a list of Domains for the specified Shopper

params.name: statuses
params.description: Only include results with `status` value in the specified set

params.name: statusGroups
params.description: Only include results with `status` value in any of the specified groups

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of domains to return

params.name: marker
params.description: Marker Domain to use as the offset in results

params.name: includes
params.description: Optional details to be included in the response

params.name: modifiedDate
params.description: Only include results that have been modified since the specified date

items.docs: Retrieve a list of Domains for the specified Shopper

params.description: Optimize for time ('FAST') or accuracy ('FULL')

params.description: Whether or not to include domains available for transfer. If set to True, checkType is ignored

items.docs: All contacts specified in request will be validated against all domains specifed in "domains". As an alternative, you can also pass in tlds, with the exception of `uk`, which requires full domain names

info.name: Suggest alternate Domain names based on a seed Domain, a set of keywords, or the shopper's purchase history

params.name: query
params.description: Domain name or set of keywords for which alternative domain names will be suggested

params.name: country
params.description:
Two-letter ISO country code to be used as a hint for target region

NOTE: These are sample values, there are many more

params.name: city
params.description: Name of city to be used as a hint for target region

params.name: sources
params.description:
Sources to be queried

  • CC_TLD - Varies the TLD using Country Codes
  • EXTENSION - Varies the TLD
  • KEYWORD_SPIN - Identifies keywords and then rotates each one
  • PREMIUM - Includes variations with premium prices

params.name: tlds
params.description:
Top-level domains to be included in suggestions

NOTE: These are sample values, there are many more

params.name: lengthMax
params.description: Maximum length of second-level domain

params.name: lengthMin
params.description: Minimum length of second-level domain

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of suggestions to return

params.name: waitMs
params.description:
Maximum amount of time, in milliseconds, to wait for responses
If elapses, return the results compiled up to that point

items.docs: Suggest alternate Domain names based on a seed Domain, a set of keywords, or the shopper's purchase history

info.name: Retrieve the forwarding information for the given fqdn

params.name: customerId
params.description:
The Customer identifier
Note: For API Resellers, performing actions on behalf of your customers, you need to specify the Subaccount you're operating on behalf of; otherwise use your shopper id.

params.name: fqdn
params.description: The fully qualified domain name whose forwarding details are to be retrieved.

params.name: includeSubs
params.description: Optionally include all sub domains if the fqdn specified is a domain and not a sub domain.

items.docs:
Notes:
  • **shopperId** is **not the same** as **customerId**. **shopperId** is a number of max length 10 digits (*ex:* 1234567890) whereas **customerId** is a UUIDv4 (*ex:* 295e3bc3-b3b9-4d95-aae5-ede41a994d13)

params.name: fqdn

items.docs:
Notes:
  • **shopperId** is **not the same** as **customerId**. **shopperId** is a number of max length 10 digits (*ex:* 1234567890) whereas **customerId** is a UUIDv4 (*ex:* 295e3bc3-b3b9-4d95-aae5-ede41a994d13)

info.name: Retrieve a list of upcoming system Maintenances

params.name: status
params.description:
Only include results with the selected `status` value. Returns all results if omitted
  • ACTIVE - The upcoming maintenance is active.
  • CANCELLED - The upcoming maintenance has been cancelled.

params.name: modifiedAtAfter
params.description: Only include results with `modifiedAt` after the supplied date

params.name: startsAtAfter
params.description: Only include results with `startsAt` after the supplied date

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return

items.docs: Retrieve a list of upcoming system Maintenances

params.description: The identifier for the system maintenance

items.docs: Retrieve the details for an upcoming system Maintenances

params.name: includes

items.docs: Retrieve api usage request counts for a specific year/month.  The data is retained for a period of three months.
